title: Shrink multi-region bills 55% without losing users
meta_description: Cut multi-region AWS bills 55% with Redis caching — latency drops from 142 ms to 28 ms, cache hit ratio 96%, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams triple their AWS bill when they go multi-region.

They don’t need to.

I cut $2,100/mo from a $3,800 bill without losing users.

https://kubaik.github.io/shrink-multi-region-bills-55-without-losing-users
